description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push, pull request, tag creation, and a weekly schedule. The workflow should have three jobs: build-ubuntu on ubuntu-22.04, build-osx on macos-13, and build-windows on windows-2022. Each job should check out the repository, install dependencies, generate a project with CMake, build, and test. The build-osx and build-windows jobs should also create and upload installers, but skip this step for pull requests.
